citations.quote: NOTICE TO QUIT ... THE COURT OF EDINBURGH NAPIER UNIVERSITY ... 20 April 2026 ... Dear ANFAL ELBUSHRA ... Student Number: 40805511
the said Court of Edinburgh Napier University holds the Tenancy Agreement as terminated as at 1. requires you to move from Bedroom B Flat 05 Castlelaw Hol
An Accommodation Officer will make arrangements | Yours sincerely, Brydon Connolly Student Accommod.
Clause 2 of the said Tenancy Agreement
Edinburgh Naplev ... BY HAND UNIVERSITY ... ANFAL ELBUSHRA Facilities Services Bedroom B Flat 05 Castlelaw House Student Accommogaton

findings.text: Source NAP-SRC-0020 is a WhatsApp image of a Notice to Quit from Edinburgh Napier University to Anfal Elbushra, dated 20 April 2026, referencing student number 40805511.
The Notice to Quit states the tenancy is terminated due to breach of Clause 2, requiring the tenant to vacate Bedroom B, Flat 05, Castlelaw House.
The Notice is signed by Brydon Connolly, Student Accommodation officer, and mentions an Accommodation Officer will arrange move-out.
OCR confidence is low (0.65); key details (termination date, full property address) are garbled or missing. A certified copy is needed for reliable evidence.

proposed_artifacts.content:
# Notice to Quit Assessment

**Source:** NAP-SRC-0020 (WhatsApp image, OCR confidence 0.65)

**Document:** Notice to Quit from Edinburgh Napier University to Anfal Elbushra, dated 20 April 2026.

**Key Findings:**
- Purports to terminate tenancy for breach of Clause 2.
- Requires vacation of Bedroom B, Flat 05, Castlelaw House.
- Signed by Brydon Connolly, Student Accommodation.

**Issues:**
- Termination date is illegible (OCR: 'as at 1.').
- Property address incomplete.
- No tenancy agreement in evidence.
- Source is uncertified candidate image.

**Recommendation:** Obtain a certified copy of the Notice to Quit from Edinburgh Napier University to verify all details and ensure admissibility.
proposed_artifacts.title: Notice to Quit Assessment

proposed_tasks.instructions: Contact Edinburgh Napier University Student Accommodation (Tel: 0131 455 3713, Fax: 0131 408 8728) to request a certified original copy of the Notice to Quit issued to Anfal Elbushra (student number 40805511) on 20 April 2026. Confirm the termination date, property address, and the specific breach of Clause 2. Obtain a signed/stamped copy for the record.
proposed_tasks.title: Request certified copy of Notice to Quit from Edinburgh Napier University

redaction_flags.reason: Contains personal data: student name (Anfal Elbushra), student number (40805511), and address (Bedroom B, Flat 05, Castlelaw House).

risk_flags.risk: Source is a low-confidence OCR of a WhatsApp image; may be inadmissible or unreliable without certification.
Termination date is illegible; if the notice period is insufficient, the notice may be invalid under Scottish law.
Signature and authority of Brydon Connolly are unverified; the notice may lack proper authorisation.

summary: OCR-extracted text from source NAP-SRC-0020 (WhatsApp image of a Notice to Quit) is low-confidence (0.65) and contains garbled fields. The document purports to be a Notice to Quit from Edinburgh Napier University to Anfal Elbushra dated 20 April 2026, citing breach of tenancy. Key details (date of termination, property address) are illegible or corrupted. The image is a candidate source; no certified or clear original copy has been obtained. A follow-up task is proposed to request a certified copy from the university.

uncertainties.reason: OCR garbled the termination date ('as at 1.') and property address ('Castlelaw Hol'). The original image may contain legible text not captured by OCR.
The source is a candidate WhatsApp image; its authenticity and chain of custody are unverified. No certified or original copy has been obtained.
The specific breach of Clause 2 is not described in the extracted text; the tenancy agreement itself is not in evidence.
